## What should improve?

Describe the gap in docs, onboarding, release notes, screenshots, issue hygiene, or contributor guidance.

## Where is it?

- README
- CONTRIBUTING
- SECURITY
- docs/
- GitHub issue templates
- releases / changelog
- other:

## Suggested fix

What would make this better?

## Why it matters

How would this improve trust, onboarding, or project adoption?
